name: Payment Card Compliance Gate
description: Any system that handles payment card data must explicitly declare PCI-DSS in compliance[]. Implied handling through a payment provider does not remove this requirement. The agent must not assume a specific payment provider is in scope without human confirmation.

trigger.condition: requirements reference payment card data, card numbers, CVV, expiry dates, cardholder names, or payment processing
trigger.rationale: Any contact with card data — even if delegated to a provider — creates PCI-DSS scope.

pass_conditions: A payment handling strategy is declared (e.g. tokenisation, full delegation to payment provider)
fail_conditions: Requirements reference card data AND 'PCI-DSS' is not in compliance[]
Requirements reference card data AND no payment handling strategy is declared

context_schema.payment_handling_strategy: string|null — e.g. 'Stripe tokenisation', 'full delegation to payment provider'

resolution_required: Payment handling strategy declared — specifying whether card data is stored, tokenised, or fully delegated

fail.reason: Card data present, PCI-DSS not declared, no handling strategy

pass.payment_handling_strategy: Stripe tokenisation — raw card data never stored
